name: git-commit-and-push
title: Git Commit And Push
description: When the user wants to commit and push the current repository changes, stage the work, generate a concise message, commit, and push to the current branch.

name: import-third-party-skill
title: Import Third-Party Skill
description: Import an open-source third-party skill or skill repository into Drew Grant's personal Skills Hub from any working directory.
